overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character with a large yellow backpack traversing a desolate mountainous landscape. The character navigates cliff edges overlooking misty canyons, crosses shallow streams, and moves through narrow rocky passages in an atmospheric, overcast environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge path overlooking misty canyon

events.description: character stops walking to stand at cliff edge and observe the canyon vista
screen fades to black indicating scene transition

agents.ego_description: walking along a rocky cliff path before stopping to overlook a vast misty canyon with a distant waterfall

entered.detail: uneven rocky terrain along the cliff edge
distant mountain range with reddish peaks
vast misty canyon with steep vertical drops
vertical rock wall dropping into the canyon depths
tall white structure visible on the distant ridge
large waterfall cascading into the canyon mist

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a precarious rocky cliff path with a vast misty canyon visible to the right. The terrain is uneven with dark volcanic rocks. After walking a short distance, the character stops at the edge to observe the breathtaking view of the canyon, waterfall, and distant mountains before the screen fades to black.

events.description: character descends slope and steps into a shallow stream
character crosses the stream and continues on the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: carefully walking downhill through grassy rocky terrain and crossing a shallow stream

entered.detail: terrain with patches of brown grass and scattered rocks
large mountain face with distinctive red and black rock strata
narrow water flow running through the rocky valley floor
large rocks strewn across the landscape

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the character appears on a grassy rocky hillside with a large red-rock mountain visible in the distance. The character descends the slope, navigating through patches of dry grass and scattered boulders, then carefully steps into and crosses a shallow stream before continuing along the rocky valley floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep walls

events.description: path narrows into a tight canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow rocky canyon, stepping over stones and wading through shallow water

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall steep rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
scattered rocks and boulders filling the canyon floor ahead

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls rising on both sides, blocking most of the sky. The character continues forward through the confined space, navigating over rocky debris and through the shallow stream that now runs closer to the path. The canyon walls create a sense of enclosure as the character progresses deeper into the rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the expansive heights of a misty canyon down into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow rocky gorge. It begins with the character traversing a precarious cliff path of dark volcanic rock, pausing at the edge to overlook a vast vista of waterfalls and distant mountains. As the perspective shifts to a grassy hillside, the camera follows the character descending through dry brush and scattered boulders toward a prominent red-rock mountain. The scene then opens into a valley floor where the character crosses a shallow stream before the terrain gradually tightens into a confined canyon. Finally, the environment transforms into a narrow passage with steep rock walls that block the sky, guiding the character deeper into the enclosed rocky terrain.
